calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., for the Plaintiff TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION.
Witness: Danna Sikand sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Joshua Davis.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is forfeited, void, and of no effect.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 220 Golden Gate Avenue, #815, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Damages $493.21
Attorney's Fees $150.00
Costs $ are waived.
for a Total Judgment of $643.21
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Off Calendar

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Dev. Corp. is present. Represented by Dana Sikand.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joshua Davis DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of OCT-07-2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
